heading: Protection of national security information
label: 2421 Protection of national security information
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Mar. 1, 2000section 3299 of Pub. L. 106–65section 2401 of this title

children.heading: Policies and procedures required
children.label: a Policies and procedures required
children.text: The Administrator shall establish procedures to ensure the maximum protection of classified information in the possession of the Administration.

children.heading: Prompt reporting
children.label: b Prompt reporting
children.text: The Administrator shall establish procedures to ensure prompt reporting to the Administrator of any significant problem, abuse, violation of law or Executive order, or deficiency relating to the management of classified information by personnel of the Administration.
